title: Natural Size Variation
description: Every entity now has a different size.
body:
# Natural Size Variation

[![](https://img.shields.io/discord/574476444366012420?label=Discord&color=393939&labelColor=5865F2&style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/cwqwNx3TGE)
[![](https://img.shields.io/endpoint.svg?url=https%3A%2F%2Fshieldsio-patreon.vercel.app%2Fapi%3Fusername%3Dmandalacreations%26type%3Dpatrons&style=for-the-badge&color=393939&labelColor=FF424D&logoColor=FFFFFF)](https://www.patreon.com/mandalacreations)

Isn't it strange that every entity of a type has the exact same size? Let's change that.

With Natural Size Variation every spawned entity gets a random scale modifier assigned, meaning that every mob you encounter is unique. The scale modifier is based on a normal distribution, ensuring that most entities are near their normal size and extreme values only happen rarely. 

![Two Iron Golems with different sizes.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dccf66f6357e5439d7f29f1a2f7b865de44caa7c.png)

![](https://i.imgur.com/4r5WLBc.png)
![](https://i.imgur.com/fpeqHMC.png)
